programmes.show_description: Goddess Of The Music Store. Georgie helps Connor impress his new crush, while Mandy, Audrey and Jim struggle to butt out of Connor's love life. S1, Ep15
Baby Fight! Georgie and Mandy worry they're not on the same page when they disagree about having another kid, and Mary, Jim and Audrey struggle to stay out of it. S1, Ep16
Tumor Takeover. Matt has a skin condition that causes tumours to grow all over his body. Plus, Jennifer has a unicorn bump on her forehead. S1, Ep11
Sisters Lumpity Lump Lump. Amber has hundreds of tumours on her face. Cheri and Janice suffer from possibly matching lumps. Tatiana has an embarrassing bump on her butt cheek. S1, Ep12
Milla's Story. At 700lbs, Milla is dependent on her husband. Terrified each day will be her last can Milla stop a lifetime of unhealthy eating to qualify for gastric surgery? S4, Ep11
Cynthia's Story. Single mother-of five-Cynthia works as a special needs teacher, but that is becoming impossible at 610 pounds - now she risks losing her family and her life. S5, Ep3
She Said Maybe To The Dress. Radio host Kenzie wants a dress that is as loud and sparkly as her personality. Plus, Jenny Tolman gets married on a beautiful, snowy mountaintop. S21, Ep3
It's Gotta Be ... Substantial. Vanisha wants a sexy dress, but her opinionated sisters become an obstacle. Paris is a former bridal consultant who needs an over-the-top ball gown. S21, Ep4
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Dolomite, Apple Slices. Sheldon makes a new friend who introduces him to a new field of science, while his parents disagree on how to handle Sheldon's blossoming social life. S1, Ep15
Killer Asteroids, Oklahoma. A disappointing loss at the science fair sparks an existential crisis and sends Sheldon's life in a new direction. S1, Ep16
Jiu-Jitsu, Bubble Wrap. When Sheldon is bullied by an unlikely character, Mary and George disagree on how to handle the situation. S1, Ep17
A Mother, A Child. When Mary bans Sheldon from reading a mature comic book, Sheldon decides it's time to assert his independence from his mother. S1, Ep18
Gluons, Guacamole. When Sheldon is no longer academically challenged at Medford High, he audits a college class taught by a professor. S1, Ep19
A Dog, A Squirrel. A heated argument erupts between the Coopers and their neighbours when a new dog terrorises Sheldon. S1, Ep20
Goddess Of The Music Store. Georgie helps Connor impress his new crush, while Mandy, Audrey and Jim struggle to butt out of Connor's love life. S1, Ep15
Baby Fight! Georgie and Mandy worry they're not on the same page when they disagree about having another kid, and Mary, Jim and Audrey struggle to stay out of it. S1, Ep16
The Cornhusker Vortex. Hoping to fit in with Penny's football-loving friends, Leonard gets tutored in the sport by Sheldon. Raj is furious over the loss of his patang. S3, Ep6
The Guitarist Amplification. Leonard and Penny's first big fight sees Sheldon playing mediator due to childhood trauma that means he can't be around loud verbal conflicts. S3, Ep7
The Vengeance Formulation. Barry Kripke pranks Sheldon during his spot on NPR, leaving him wanting vengeance. Bernadette pressures Wolowitz to define their relationship. S3, Ep9
The Gorilla Experiment. Penny seeks Sheldon's help to better comprehend Leonard's physics work. Wolowitz sees green when Leonard invites Bernadette to watch an experiment. S3, Ep10
The Maternal Congruence. A Christmas visit from his mother has Leonard discovering she's kept a lot of news from him that she shares with Sheldon. S3, Ep11
The Psychic Vortex. Leonard is aghast to find out that Penny believes in psychics. Sheldon tries to assist Koothrappali in picking up a girl at a university party. S3, Ep12
The Bozeman Reaction. A robbery of their apartment sees Leonard and Sheldon call on their friends to devise a security system. S3, Ep13
The Einstein Approximation. Stuck on the solution to a physics problem, Sheldon tries different methods to change his thinking, including working at The Cheesecake Factory. S3, Ep14
The Large Hadron Collision. When Leonard is offered a trip to Switzerland on Valentine's Day to see a particle accelerator, he must choose between taking Penny or Sheldon. S3, Ep15
The Excelsior Acquisition. An appearance in traffic court comes at the worst possible time for Sheldon, the same day Stan Lee is appearing at the comic book store. S3, Ep16
The Precious Fragmentation. The guys go to a garage sale and find a ring from the Lord of the Rings films, and the rare find threatens their friendship. S3, Ep17
The Pants Alternative. Sheldon's fear of speaking in front of large groups threatens his ability to accept an award, so the gang tries to help him prepare for the big night. S3, Ep18
The Wheaton Recurrence. Sheldon squares off at the bowling alley against nemesis Wil Wheaton. Leonard's miffed over Penny's response when he says, 'I love you.' S3, Ep19
The Spaghetti Catalysis. Following Leonard and Penny's break up, Sheldon tries to hide from Leonard and the gang that he had a friendly spaghetti dinner at Penny's. S3, Ep20
The Plimpton Stimulation. Sheldon hosts a visiting female physicist, but her intelligence seems matched by her libido. S3, Ep21
The Staircase Implementation. A squabble over the thermostat setting leads to Leonard going over to Penny's and recounting the story of how he met and moved in with Sheldon. S3, Ep22
The Lunar Excitation. Howard and Raj set Sheldon up on an Internet dating site. Penny discovers that she can't go back to dating dumb jocks after dating Leonard. S3, Ep23
The Robotic Manipulation. Howard uses a robotic arm for his own pleasure. Sheldon goes on a date with Amy Farrah Fowler, and Penny finds herself accompanying them. S4, Ep1
Cruciferous Veg Amplification. Sheldon calculates that he'll be dead before technology exists to download his consciousness into a robot, so he goes on a healthy-living binge. S4, Ep2
The Zazzy Substitution. Sheldon breaks up with Amy Farrah Fowler, and the guys worry when he starts replacing her with cats. S4, Ep3
Dara Ó Briain hosts more laughter filled game play with guests Rhys James, Angela Barnes, Sarah Keyworth, Glenn Moore, Milton Jones and Ahir Shah. S1, Ep6
L.A. will never be the same after brash Detroit cop Axel hits town. He turns Beverly Hills upside-down and teaches the local police a thing or two.
Summer Sausage, Pocket Poncho. While Sheldon is obsesses over Meemaw's budding relationship with his mentor, Dr. Sturgis, George and Mary attempt to bond with their other kids. S1, Ep21
Ice Cream, Gentlemen Callers. When Meemaw is pursued by two gentlemen callers, Sheldon interferes, forcing her to set some ground rules. S1, Ep22
Popping Popeye. Lisa fears the horn growing out of the back of her head could be cancer. Chuck has a Popeye-shaped bump on his arm, and two teen brothers have matching lumps. S1, Ep13
Sean's Story. 26-year-old Sean weighs over 700-lbs. His mother is forced to change both of their lifestyles before he can be approved for gastric bypass surgery. S4, Ep12
Moments of Truth. Explores 10 years of documentation of the super-obese to highlight key breakthrough moments within their turbulent but ultimately triumphant weight-loss journeys. S4, Ep13
Didn't Mean To Make Randy Cry. New consultant Cat tries to find the perfect dress for singer-songwriter Mary Lambert. Bald bride Rachel makes comments that bring Randy to tears. S21, Ep5
I'm Marrying Me. One-of-a-kind bride Nicoletta arrives with crystals, sage, and a plan to marry herself. Paraplegic bride, Natalie hopes to experience that magical bridal feeling. S21, Ep6
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
A High-Pitched Buzz. Sheldon dismantles the refrigerator to stop an annoying hum and then must get a paper route to pay for the repairs. S2, Ep1
A Rival Prodigy. When Dr. Sturgis bonds with Paige, another 10-year-old genius, Sheldon gets jealous. Meanwhile, Mary invites Paige's family over for a play date. S2, Ep2
A Crisis Of Faith. When Mary's faith is shaken by a tragedy in the community, Sheldon becomes an unlikely ally. S2, Ep3
A Financial Secret. When George Sr. asks Sheldon to keep a secret from Mary, the stress of not being honest drives Sheldon to hide out at Tam's for his first sleepover. S2, Ep4
A Research Study. Dr. Sturgis recommends Sheldon and Missy for a university research study on twins, and Mary is unhappy when the test results go to Sheldon's head. S2, Ep5
Seven Deadly Sins. Mary clashes with Sheldon's drama teacher Mr. Lundy over plans for a Halloween haunted house fundraiser for the church. S2, Ep6
The Hot Troll Deviation. Wolowitz is embarrassed when a secret of his is revealed, and Sheldon and Raj battle at work. S4, Ep4
The Desperation Emanation. Sheldon meets Amy's mum and comes to the realisation he no longer wants to see Amy, and Leonard realises everyone is in a relationship except for him. S4, Ep5
The Irish Pub Formulation. When Raj's sister has a one-day layover, he forbids the others from hooking up with her, unaware she and Leonard already did long ago. S4, Ep6
The Apology Insufficiency. The rest of the gang is interviewed by the FBI for Wolowitz's security clearance, with Sheldon accidentally letting slip some damaging information. S4, Ep7
The 21-Second Excitation. The guys camp out to see a print of Raiders of the Lost Ark with 21 extra seconds and are outraged to see Wil Wheaton and his friends skip the line. S4, Ep8
The Boyfriend Complexity. Penny asks Leonard to lie to her visiting father, while Howard, Raj and Bernadette spend all night looking through a telescope. S4, Ep9
The Alien Parasite Hypothesis. Amy crushes on one of Penny's dim ex-boyfriends, Zack. Raj and Wolowitz argue over who'd be the better superhero. S4, Ep10
Justice League Recombination. The guys get Zack and Penny to join their Justice League costume for a New Year's Eve bash at the comic book store. S4, Ep11
The Bus Pants Utilization. Their friendship becomes strained when Sheldon tries to take over Leonard's creation of a smartphone application that solves differential equations. S4, Ep12
The Love Car Displacement. Howard is jealous when Bernadette runs into her old boyfriend at a science event they're attending. S4, Ep13
The Thespian Catalyst. Sheldon wants acting lessons from Penny, hoping they will make him a better teacher. S4, Ep14
The Benefactor Factor. After meeting at a fundraising gala, an aged but wealthy Caltech donor makes Leonard ponder if he's willing to have sex with her to secure a donation. S4, Ep15
The Cohabitation Formulation. Howard contemplates a serious decision in his relationship with Bernadette, and Leonard and Raj's sister start seeing each other again. S4, Ep16
The Toast Derivation. Sheldon is in a crisis when he realises he's not the epicentre of the group, so he decides to find new friends. S4, Ep17
The Prestidigitation Approximation. Leonard has a tough choice to make when Priya asks him to stop spending time with Penny, and Howard keeps pestering Sheldon with a magic trick. S4, Ep18
The Zarnecki Incursion. The guys become sleuths to find out who hacked Sheldon's online-game account. S4, Ep19
The Herb Garden Germination. Sheldon and Amy decide to start rumours about themselves as a social test. Howard takes his relationship with Bernadette to an even higher level. S4, Ep20
The Agreement Dissection. Priya uses her legal expertise to rip apart Sheldon's roommate agreement, and the women take the flustered Sheldon out dancing. S4, Ep21
The Wildebeest Implementation. Raj makes an attempt to cure his phobia of talking to women, and Penny spies on Leonard and Priya with the help of Bernadette. S4, Ep22
The Engagement Reaction. Mrs. Wolowitz ends up in the hospital after Howard tells her he's marrying Bernadette. While there, Leonard stresses over Penny and Priya. S4, Ep23
Two Idiots On A Dirt Bike. Georgie's attempt to break up Missy and her new boyfriend backfires, with severe consequences. S1, Ep17
TV Money. Mandy tries to prove she's financially responsible after being called out on her poor spending habits, and Connor's girlfriend needs a place to stay. S1, Ep18
Dara Ó Briain is joined by guests Rhys James, Alasdair Beckett-King, Ed Byrne, Hugh Dennis and Ellie Taylor to comedically examine the week's events. S1, Ep7
Dara Ó Briain hosts more laughter filled game play with guests Rhys James, Angela Barnes, Sarah Keyworth, Glenn Moore, Milton Jones and Ahir Shah. S1, Ep6
